silhouette: Bright very sharp upright centered pointed teardrop silhouette with a cute plump/chubby, full rounded, buoyant pear-bottom body that is visibly wider and softer than Padarana; the lower half stays wider, rounder, heavier, and softer than the upper body, the soft wide lower belly stays round under the sharp head, and the head never leans into a quiet side-leaning top.
face: Open lively dot eyes, eager smile, highly expressive default read, no eyebrows or brow marks.
body_language: Social, animated, first to jump into action or trends.
do_not_change: Keep her visually energetic, very sharp-headed, plump/chubby, full-bodied, and lively.
Keep the head very sharp, upright, tall, clean, centered above her face, and visibly pointed; do not soften, round off, shorten, tilt left, or replace the apex.

Keep the body cute, plump/chubby, full rounded, buoyant, lower-heavy, pear-bottomed, and wide-bellied under the sharp head; not a generic droplet, not Muci's squat soft protagonist baseline, and no side nubs or arm-like protrusions.

When Padaruna appears with Nia, keep Padaruna's lower half visibly wider and rounder than Nia's tall narrow controlled silhouette; Padaruna must not inherit Nia's straight sides, slim lower body, angled brow, or stretched vertical body.
When Padaruna appears with Muci, make Padaruna's overall body scale read about 1.1x Muci's size.
Do not add eyebrows or brow marks.
Do not flatten her expression into generic neutrality.
Use her face to carry momentum and hype.
Do not copy a right-drifting or side-leaning head/top silhouette; keep the head upright, sharp, and centered.
Do not draw her skinny, narrow, tall-stretched, delicate, Nia-shaped, or quiet/restrained.
Do not slim her into Padarana, sharpen her into Nia, quiet her into a restrained side-leaning droplet, or soften her into Muci.
